DEF. CAME LOOKING FOR STAN,WAS TOLD BY PRES.JDG TO SEE STAN FOR CONT'CE.GAVE HER COPY FOR 6/10 8AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPY CENTRAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSORO CATHERINE $1,274.85 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,310.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OSORO CATHERINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT COPY CENTRAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
